title: New Year's Eve on board the Belle - Review of San ...
content: The boarding was fast, the staff was welcoming and bartender was great. The food was very plentiful and outstanding same with dessert. Had a wonderful cruise

title: The San Francisco Belle
content: The beautifully renovated Belle is the crown jewel of San Francisco Bay. From bow to stern her decks are a grand expression of Art Nouveau.

title: San Francisco Belle
content: Want to cruise San Francisco Bay in the utmost of style and comfort? The beautifully renovated San Francisco Belle is the crown jewel of the Bay Area.

title: San Francisco: Muir Woods, Sausalito and SF Bay Cruise | GetYourGuide
content: # San Francisco: Muir Woods, Sausalito and SF Bay Cruise. Escape the bustle of San Francisco on a half­-day trip to Muir Woods & Sausalito. Journey across the Golden Gate Bridge to the Bay Area's most popular national monument, see the prettiest village in California and end the day with a 1-hour Bay Cruise. – United States March 26, 2025 - Verified booking  Tour guide was excellent — he was personable, charismatic, and knowledgeable. 5 5 out of 5 stars  C Christoph – Germany June 29, 2024 - Verified booking  The Muir Woods in the morning are so beautiful. 5 5 out of 5 stars  S Shannon – United States June 18, 2024 - Verified booking  Excellent tour and guide. 5 5 out of 5 stars  L Lori – United Kingdom April 28, 2024 - Verified booking  Just amazing. 5 5 out of 5 stars  R Rachel – United States March 19, 2024 - Verified booking  Our tour guide Joe was great.
